summary: Iteration 60 - Bug Fixes Testing Complete. P0 bugs FIXED: Carousel Generator and Hashtag Bank are now working correctly. P1 dark theme applied to Feature Requests page. New HelpGuide component added but has z-index conflict with existing AIChatbot. Landing page navigation working.

ui_bugs.issue: Z-index conflict: HelpGuide button (bottom-6 right-6 z-40) is overlapped by AIChatbot button (bottom-6 right-6 z-50). Both buttons are at nearly identical positions (HelpGuide x=1848,y=1008 vs Chatbot x=1840,y=1000), causing clicks on HelpGuide to open the AI Chatbot instead.
ui_bugs.suggested_fix: Change HelpGuide position to bottom-24 right-6 OR change AIChatbot to bottom-24. The original requirement says FeedbackWidget should be at bottom-24, but AIChatbot is at bottom-6 creating conflict.

carousel_generator.description: P0 bug FIXED - Carousel Generator now displays slides correctly with slideNumber, headline, body, type properties
carousel_generator.evidence: Generated 7 slides with Cover, Content (Point 1-5), and CTA slides. All slide properties render correctly.

hashtag_bank.description: P0 bug FIXED - Hashtag Bank displays hashtags array correctly with copy functionality
hashtag_bank.evidence: Retrieved 10 business hashtags (#business, #entrepreneur, etc.) with 'Copy All Hashtags' button and tip displayed

feature_requests_dark_theme.description: P1 fix verified - Dark slate gradient theme applied (rgb(2,6,23) to rgb(15,23,42))
feature_requests_dark_theme.evidence: Background confirmed as linear-gradient from slate-950 to slate-900

help_guide_component.description: HelpGuide button visible with data-testid='help-guide-btn' but overlapped by AIChatbot
help_guide_component.evidence: Button found at position x=1848, y=1008 but clicks are intercepted by Chatbot at x=1840, y=1000

landing_page_navigation.description: All navigation links present and working
landing_page_navigation.evidence: Tested: Pricing (/pricing), Reviews (/reviews), Help (/user-manual), Contact (/contact), Login (/login), Get Started (/signup) - all functional

content_calendar.evidence: Generated 7-day calendar with date, contentType, suggestedTopic, bestPostingTime

trending_topics.evidence: Retrieved 8 topics with topic, hook, and engagement level

action_items: FIX: HelpGuide z-index conflict with AIChatbot - either move HelpGuide to bottom-24 or move AIChatbot to different position
VERIFY: HelpGuide panel opens correctly after position fix
critical_code_review_comments: HelpGuide.js uses bottom-6 right-6 z-40, but AIChatbot.js uses bottom-6 right-6 z-50 - same position with different z-index causes click interception
Consider consolidating floating button positions in a single configuration file to prevent future conflicts

success_rate.frontend: 85% (6/7 features working - HelpGuide has z-index issue)

context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 bugs for Carousel and Hashtag fixed. HelpGuide button exists but z-index conflict with AIChatbot at same position prevents clicking. Once position conflict resolved, verify HelpGuide panel opens with contextual content for each page.

rca_of_issue.carousel_bug: Property name mismatch between backend (slideNumber, headline, body) and frontend expectations - FIXED
rca_of_issue.hashtag_bug: Frontend expected Object.entries but backend returns array - FIXED
rca_of_issue.helpguide_conflict: Both HelpGuide (z-40) and AIChatbot (z-50) positioned at bottom-6 right-6, chatbot intercepts clicks
